flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at McDowell Technical Community College fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (25.0% → 16.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at McDowell Technical Community College rose 15% between 2012 and 2015 ($4.9k → $5.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at McDowell Technical Community College fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (13.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at McDowell Technical Community College rose 41% between 2021 and 2024 (431 → 608).
